nasb.text: Thus Joseph stored up grain in great abundance like the sand of the sea, until he stopped measuring it, for it was beyond measure.

esv.text: And Joseph stored up grain in great abundance, like the sand of the sea, until he ceased to measure it, for it could not be measured.

cnv.text: 約瑟積蓄了極多的五穀，好像海沙那樣多，甚至他不再記下數量，因為實在無法計算。

ccb.text: 约瑟积存了大量五谷，多如海沙，不可胜数。

csbs.text: 约瑟积蓄的五谷极其多，如同海边的沙粒，多到无法数算，以致他停止了计量。
